results.title: Buy HILO (HILO): Best Purchase Options & Alternatives - Binance
results.content:
### 3

Buy a stablecoin as your base currency

For better coin compatibility, you can consider buying a stablecoin first. Stablecoins like USDT, USDC, is a type of cryptocurrency designed to maintain a stable value which is compatible with most cryptocurrency swaps. 
   On your Binance Web3 Wallet, tap Receive.
   You can choose to transfer your stablecoin from Binance Exchange, Wallet Address or credit or debit card.
   Once the transfer is complete, you’ll see USDT in your wallet under Assets.

### 4

Swap your USDT for HILO

   Open the Binance Web3 Wallet in the app. 
   Go to the Trade tab.
   Under From, select your USDT.
   Under To, select HILO.
   Enter the amount you want to buy and tap Approve & Swap.

 The swap will process, and your HILO will appear in your wallet.
